entry.summary:
Author: In_aweof_writing

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 427Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

entry.title: mack-a-rooms
entry.summary:
Author: julia_with_luv

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,810Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Modern confectioneries just might be Arthur's favorite thing about his return from Avalon. On one weekly outing, Merlin and Arthur have an encounter that prompts Arthur to finally ask about Merlin's attire.Written for the merthurmicrofic prompt "man".

entry.title: I Keep Pushing Myself (I Can't Take It At All)
entry.summary:
Author: RoseByAnyOtherName17

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,484Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: The first thing Arthur does when he sees Merlin again is kiss him. It’s the wrong thing to do, he knows, especially when Merlin is too shocked (or disoriented, maybe) to kiss him back. But what else can Arthur do? He’s watched Merlin for over a millennia from behind a veil. He's done watching. -- In which Merlin, after fifteen hundred years of waiting, is ready to give up and Arthur returns to him, prophecy be damned.   Note: suicidal ideation is very vague and brief, but proceed with caution if that is a concern for you

entry.title: Two Hearts, Bound by Fate
entry.summary:
Author: Encantus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,698Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin Emerson, a hybrid Labrador/Wolf Therian (or Shifter) leaves his small town in Texas and travels to New Haven, Connecticut to attend Wildwood Academy, one of the most prestigious colleges for Shifters in America. While there he quickly realizes that his destiny is about to catch up with him when he bumps into his mate, purely by accident. He's arrogant, rude, and rich, the exact opposite of Merlin. Oh, and he's a Cat. Merlin will find a depth in Arthur that he isn't expecting, but also something more: a home. Somewhere he truly belongs, where he can be himself. Is this what he was looking for all along? Is this going to last? He certainly hopes it's not some cruel joke of fate.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Dragonlord's Predicament
entry.summary:
Author: JustGettingBy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,253Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 868

Summary: Merlin's new Dragonlord powers come with some unforeseen side effects. When he's kidnapped by bandits, the new aspect of his powers makes itself known. But Merlin could've gotten himself out of the mess on his own, thank you very much, if only Arthur hadn't made it worse by rushing in and trying to save him.

entry.title: CONTEXT DOC - Morgana & Arthur Gender Fuckery AU
entry.summary:
Author: PMblurbs_ground0

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,828Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 0

Summary: READ FIRST FOR SERIES CONTEXT!Since (for the time being) I'll be posting this series as multiple disjointed scenes, here is some basic context that should help keep up with who's who and what's what. I've avoided as many actual plot spoilers as possible, however Chapter 3 does have quite a few (it's labeled)—though if you're familiar with Arthurian myth then certain bits may be obvious.

entry.title: How to go from Manservant to Court Sorcerer in ??? easy steps
entry.summary:
Author: writingmybest

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,889Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 66

Summary: During an attempt to rescue Elyan and Leon from King Aurelius, everyone is captured, but when Lancelot and Merlin are forced to battle Aurelius' champion and Lancelot is injured, Merlin makes the decisions to save him using magic. What unfolds is a study into the relationship Merlin has with every member of the Round Table ( plus Gwen) and how Merlin goes from manservant to warlock to Court Sorceror in the eyes of his chosen family. Hello, this is my first legitimate fanfic and the first chapter is Short but I'm just testing the waters to see how you guys receive this idea. I'm excited to hear from you guys so don't be shy! Edit 2024: omg hello. I honestly can't tell you why I stopped writing this, life just kinda. Exploded. But I re read my first 2 chapters and am Shocked that they are as good as they are so I think I'm going to continue this. I have all my outline still so maybe expect a new chapter soon?? FRESHLY EDITTED AND REVISED (2026)

entry.title: The Scar Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: DILLIGAF_iykyk

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,989Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: The bandits came from the tree line like shadows given teeth. Arthur had his sword drawn before the first cry rang out, steel singing free of the scabbard as he pivoted toward the rush of bodies.They were outnumbered—six knights against what looked like twenty men, ragged and desperate, pouring from the dark wood on either side of the forest road.

entry.title: Vibe Check
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,001Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 195

Summary: Arthur is saying things. Strange things. Gwaine thinks it’s the best council meeting he’s ever attended. Merlin is increasingly concerned. Everyone else is doing their best to survive it. I apologise for this in advance. This is the result of being awake for 28 hours straight and having a very questionable idea at some point in the middle of the night. “what if Arthur Pendragon came back from the future and immediately started talking like this.” It is not meant to be taken seriously in any way.

entry.title: [Podfic] Crown of Roses, Heart of Briar (by Robin_Fai)
entry.summary:
Author: AppleSapling

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: So the heart becomes bound with the roots, the lungs filled with the vines and the flowers. Thorns will maim and cut where they grasp hold. The solitary heart bears not the strength to banish the maladie. Coughing and vomiting may dislodge the barriers but only for so long as it takes for more to grow. Witches' briar consumes all in time. Thirty days from the fall of the first petal are granted unto the sufferer. Hanahaki is the curse of those with magic in their veins. No man devoid of magic’s song shall suffer this bite. - Merlin knows he was condemned from the moment he found the first petal on his pillow, because there is no way that Arthur Pendragon, the King of Camelot, can ever return his love.Podfic of Crown of Roses, Heart of Briar by Robin_Fai.

entry.title: Some and Now None of You
entry.summary:
Author: Isthisusernameavailableornot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 207,929Chapters: 64/67Kudos: 2,113

Summary: "Let him think I hate him. If that’ll stop him from risking his neck for me over and over again, then it’s a sacrifice I don’t have to think twice about." — Arthur finds out Merlin has magic. He also finds out how often Merlin risked his life for him and so, he does the only thing he can think of to protect him: banishment. Hurt and angry, Merlin leaves and swears to not look back. But, when two years pass and Morgana shows up at Merlin’s door, urging him to fill Gaius’ position as Court Physician, Merlin agrees. He really doesn’t know why, but Arthur is sure Merlin would do just about anything to get on his nerves. Unprepared for the shock of seeing Merlin back in the castle, Arthur is forced to speed along his plans to lift the ban on magic. But between stubborn councilors, a mysterious plague, a still angry Merlin, and Morgana being Morgana, Arthur is fairly certain he’ll lose his mind before the first year of his reign even ends.

entry.title: Call me ‘Arthur’
entry.summary:
Author: PMblurbs_ground0

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,720Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: It’s nearly supper when Artie—or “Arthur”, according to the tournament roster—finally meets Merlin in the armory.“Call me ‘Arthur’.”Merlin catches both her breath and her lover’s eye then, one brow raised. “Still now?”Artie nods...“Keep calling me that. Until my armor is off for the day.”---OR: queer prince[ss, for now] X queer [not-man]servant getting freaky in the armory because her servant 'claiming' her by giving her a token of favor got her way too hyped at the tournament, feat. unexpected gender euphoria

entry.title: Merlin Goes to the Tavern
entry.summary:
Author: livinginthetheater

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,739Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 189

Summary: While Arthur painstakingly repeals the ban on magic, he lashes out at Merlin. The warlock, meanwhile, just found out his mother wants to move to Camelot, and asks for a raise. Refusing to hear him out, Arthur snaps, and accuses Merlin of spending all his money at the tavern. So Merlin decides to finally go. Or, how Merlin ends up a bartender at the Rising Sun while in a fight with Arthur

entry.title: Golden Sideburns and Side-eyes
entry.summary:
Author: wryterwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,160Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 28

Summary: The one-off chapters that go with the Golden Hair/Golden Eyes Series. These are supplemental little one-shot stories that, while they go with the main work, would either mess with the flow of the main story or have tags or content that may make the main story unenjoyable to some readers These do contain references to the main story, but can be enjoyed on their own.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,029Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 66

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: strawberries and gold
entry.summary:
Author: HeraLysistrataEliaVisenya

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 805Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Freya has a picnic with Gwen and Merlin before returning to Avalon

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
